documentation: Danmarks Meteorologiske Institut (DMI) open-data triad: meteorological observations (metObs), oceanographic observations + tidewater predictions (oceanObs), and triangulated lightning strikes (lightningData). All payloads ride a single Kafka topic 'dmi' multiplexed by ce_type. The MQTT endpoint carries metObs + oceanObs only as retained QoS-1 last-known-value (LKV) topics; lightning is excluded from MQTT because per-strike events do not fit LKV semantics.

dk.dmi.metObs.MetObsStation.name: Station
dk.dmi.metObs.MetObsStation.description: Reference data for a DMI meteorological observation station. Emitted at feeder startup and refreshed daily. Stations cover Denmark, Greenland (DNK/GRL) and the Faroe Islands (FRO).

dk.dmi.metObs.MetObsObservation.name: Observation
dk.dmi.metObs.MetObsObservation.description: A single meteorological observation value reported by a station for one parameter at a specific observed time. Cadence depends on parameter (10-minute or hourly).

dk.dmi.oceanObs.OceanStation.name: OceanStation
dk.dmi.oceanObs.OceanStation.description: Reference data for an oceanographic observation station (tide gauge or other coastal sensor). Owners include DMI and Kystdirektoratet (Danish Coastal Authority).

dk.dmi.oceanObs.TidewaterStation.name: TidewaterStation
dk.dmi.oceanObs.TidewaterStation.description: Reference data for a station/grid-point at which DMI publishes tidewater (sea-level) predictions. The set partially overlaps physical tide gauges but also includes prediction-only grid points (e.g. Faroes).

dk.dmi.oceanObs.OceanObservation.name: OceanObservation
dk.dmi.oceanObs.OceanObservation.description: A single oceanographic observation. Parameters are sealev_dvr (sea level vs DVR90 datum, cm), sealev_ln (sea level vs local zero, cm), sea_reg (registered sea level by Kystdirektoratet, cm), and tw (water temperature, deg C). 10-minute cadence.

dk.dmi.oceanObs.TidewaterPrediction.name: TidewaterPrediction
dk.dmi.oceanObs.TidewaterPrediction.description: A deterministic tidewater (sea-level) prediction for one station and one forecast horizon. predictionType is typically '10minutes'; predictions are issued forward ~30 days.

dk.dmi.lightning.LightningSensor.name: LightningSensor
dk.dmi.lightning.LightningSensor.description: Reference data for one of DMI's lightning detection sensors. Six DMI-owned sensors cover Denmark; third-party sensor IDs that appear in observation.sensors are not catalogued here.

dk.dmi.lightning.LightningStrike.name: LightningStrike
dk.dmi.lightning.LightningStrike.description: A single triangulated lightning strike. Type 0 = cloud-to-ground negative, 1 = cloud-to-ground positive, 2 = cloud-to-cloud. amp is signed peak current in kA. observed timestamps have microsecond precision.

dk.dmi.lightning.description: Reference sensors (`LightningSensor`, keyed `{sensor_id}`) and per-strike telemetry (`LightningStrike`, keyed `{strike_id}`) share this messagegroup and the single `dmi` Kafka topic by design: both belong to the lightningData event family, but a triangulated strike is computed from many sensors and cannot be naturally keyed by a single one. Downstream consumers branch on `ce_type`.

subject.description: AMQP message subject — stable DMI station identifier matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.
AMQP message subject — stable meteorological observation identity matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.
AMQP message subject — stable ocean-station identifier matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.
AMQP message subject — stable tidewater-station identifier matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.
AMQP message subject — stable ocean observation identity matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.
AMQP message subject — stable tidewater prediction identity matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.
AMQP message subject — stable lightning sensor identifier matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.
AMQP message subject — stable lightning strike identifier matching the CloudEvent subject and Kafka key.

schema.name: MetObsStation
schema.description: A meteorological observation station owned and operated by (or on behalf of) DMI. See https://opendatadocs.dmi.govcloud.dk/en/Data/Meteorological_Observation_Data for the canonical field list. Identity is stable per stationId; metadata is slowly-changing via validFrom/validTo.

station_id.description: Stable DMI station identifier (e.g. '06030', '04202' for Pituffik in Greenland). Used as the Kafka partition key and CloudEvent subject.

wmo_station_id.description: World Meteorological Organization (WMO) station identifier when registered with WMO.

wmo_country_code.description: WMO country code as an integer string (e.g. '06' for Denmark).

region_id.description: DMI region identifier within the country.

type.description: Station type as classified by DMI (e.g. 'Synop', 'PluvioSync').

parameter_id.description: List of DMI parameterId values this station reports (e.g. ['temp_dry','wind_speed','humidity']).

latitude.description: Station latitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Derived from GeoJSON geometry.coordinates[1].

longitude.description: Station longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Derived from GeoJSON geometry.coordinates[0].

station_height.description: Height of the station above mean sea level.

barometer_height.description: Height of the barometer above mean sea level.

anemometer_height.description: Height of the anemometer above ground level.

valid_from.description: Timestamp from which this station-metadata version is valid.

valid_to.description: Timestamp after which this station-metadata version is no longer valid; null while current.

operation_from.description: Timestamp from which the station began operating.

operation_to.description: Timestamp at which the station stopped operating; null while operational.

created.description: Timestamp when this metadata row was created by DMI.

updated.description: Timestamp when this metadata row was last updated by DMI.

schema.name: MetObsObservation
schema.description: A single meteorological observation: one parameter, one station, one timestamp. Units are SI: degC, hPa, m/s, %, m, mm, degrees. wind_dir=0 means calm (not north).

observation_id.description: DMI-assigned per-row identifier. Not stable across re-ingestions; use (station_id, parameter_id, observed) for idempotency.

station_id.description: Reporting station identifier (foreign key to Station).

observed.description: Timestamp at which the value was observed (UTC, ISO 8601).

value.description: Numeric measurement value. Units depend on parameter_id (see DMI documentation).

latitude.description: Station latitude (decimal degrees, WGS84) at observation time.

longitude.description: Station longitude (decimal degrees, WGS84) at observation time.

schema.name: OceanStation
schema.description: An oceanographic observation station (typically a tide gauge). Owners include DMI and Kystdirektoratet (Danish Coastal Authority). See https://opendatadocs.dmi.govcloud.dk/en/Data/Oceanographic_Observation_Data.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (DNK, GRL, FRO).

parameter_id.description: Parameter IDs supported by this station (subset of {sealev_dvr, sealev_ln, sea_reg, tw}).

schema.name: TidewaterStation
schema.description: A station or virtual grid point at which DMI publishes tidewater (sea-level) predictions. The catalog includes both physical tide gauges and prediction-only points.

station_id.description: Stable identifier of the tidewater prediction station/grid-point.

schema.name: OceanObservation
schema.description: A single oceanographic measurement. parameter_id is one of: sealev_dvr (sea level vs DVR90 datum, cm; preferred since 1997), sealev_ln (sea level vs local zero, cm; preferred before 1997), sea_reg (sea-level registration by Kystdirektoratet, cm), tw (water temperature, deg C; indicative).

observation_id.description: DMI-assigned row identifier (not stable across re-ingestions).

parameter_id.description: One of sealev_dvr, sealev_ln, sea_reg, tw.

descriptions.sealev_dvr: Sea level relative to DVR90 datum (cm)
descriptions.sealev_ln: Sea level relative to local zero (cm)

value.description: Numeric value. cm for sealev_*/sea_reg, deg C for tw.

schema.name: TidewaterPrediction
schema.description: A deterministic tidewater (sea-level) prediction for one station and one forecast horizon. Predictions are issued every model cycle and span ~30 days at 10-minute granularity.

prediction_time.description: Target time for which the value is predicted.

value.description: Predicted sea level (cm vs DVR90 unless otherwise noted).

schema.name: LightningSensor
schema.description: A DMI lightning detection sensor site. Six DMI-owned sensors cover Denmark; third-party sensors that contribute to triangulation are not catalogued here but their IDs appear in Strike.sensors.

sensor_id.description: Stable sensor identifier (1..6 for DMI-owned sensors).

schema.name: LightningStrike
schema.description: A single triangulated lightning strike. See https://opendatadocs.dmi.govcloud.dk/en/Data/Lightning_Data. observed timestamps have microsecond precision; location accuracy is approximately +/- 500-2000 m.

created.description: Timestamp when DMI ingested the strike.

sensors.description: Comma-separated list of sensor IDs that contributed to triangulation (may include third-party sensors not in the Sensor catalog).
